name: Twist Bioscience Corp
summary: PART I At Twist Bioscience Corporation, we work in service of our customers who are changing the world for the better. In fields such as health care, food/agriculture, industrial chemicals/materials and academic research, by using our products, our customers are developing ways to better lives and improve the sustainability of the planet.
